catseyeSources.usedFor: Owned gear, item levels, item jobs, current gearexport metadata
Aahtacos THF level and character-state eligibility
Catseye patch context for server-specific behavior

knownThfFactsUsed: THF has Dual Wield I at level 20 on Catseye.
THF has Dual Wield II at level 40 on Catseye.
THF has Assassin at level 50 on Catseye.
THF has Bully at level 60 on Catseye.
Aahtacos is treated as THF58 from the character snapshot, so Bully is not assumed.
Viper Bite is early enough to matter for THF dagger mode.
Wasp Sting and Viper Bite have increased damage on Catseye.
Treasure Hunter has Catseye-specific caps and proc behavior.
builderAssumptions: Use CharacterSnapshot.job_level('THF') for THF level eligibility, not GearExport.currentJob.
Reject fishing, crafting, utility, travel, wrong-job, wrong-level, and wrong-weapon-family fallback gear from combat playstyles.
Preserve Melt kill speed for Treasure mode when no useful eligible Treasure Hunter gear exists.
Emit generated packs to OddLua/dist only; do not write into the live Catseye install.
